lines.speaker: Radimus Erkle
lines.text: Excuse me a moment won't you. Do feel free to explore the rest of the building

lines.speaker: Radimus Erkle
lines.text: Hello there. I have something for you. Enjoy!

lines.speaker: Radimus Erkle
lines.text: Hello there! How are you enjoying the Legends Guild?

lines.speaker: Radimus Erkle
lines.text: That's nice. Excuse me now, I have other matters to attend to. Please feel free to explore the rest of the building.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you got anything for me?

lines.speaker: Radimus Erkle
lines.text: One of our other members visited the Kharazi Jungle, following in your illustrious footsteps, and they found some weird daggers. Would you like one?

sections.title: Searching the cupboard north of the papyrus spawn after the Legends' Quest

lines.speaker: Radimus Erkle
lines.text: Hey, I think it's about time you started buying your own machetes. I'm sure there must be some jungle native down in Karamja who can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Radimus Erkle
lines.text: That doesn't look solved to me.

lines.speaker: Radimus Erkle
lines.text: Well done [player name]. Here you go.
